properties.name: blog.author.password
properties.description: Password used to authorize post creation.

properties.name: blog.author.login-rate-limit.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum failed login attempts allowed in a rate-limit window.

properties.name: blog.author.login-rate-limit.window-seconds
properties.description: Rate-limit window length in seconds for author login attempts.

properties.name: app.db.auto-migrate
properties.description: Whether startup should auto-apply lightweight schema patches.

properties.name: app.http.access-log.enabled
properties.description: Enable verbose per-request HTTP access logging (begin/end with timing).

properties.name: app.http.access-log.exclude-paths
properties.description: Comma-separated Ant patterns to skip access logging (e.g. /actuator/**,/error).

properties.name: app.http.access-log.max-body-chars
properties.description: Max characters logged for request/response body snippets (after redaction).

properties.name: app.http.access-log.request-content-cache-limit
properties.description: Max bytes buffered by ContentCachingRequestWrapper for logging (must cover largest logged request body).

properties.name: app.cors.extra-origin-patterns
properties.description: Comma-separated extra allowedOriginPatterns for CORS (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:*).
